limitations: Trained on 10 healthy adults aged 25-50; NO Parkinson's patients.
Errors were scripted by a physiotherapist, not spontaneous patient errors.
Lab lighting and framing; subjects wore motion-capture suits.
4 of 8 RehabAI exercises covered; bicep curl, arm extension and sit-to-stand have no training data and fall back to the rule-based scorer.
Knee lift is approximated by leg abduction (different movement plane).
